_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Support the design and execution of exercise scenarios.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model evaluation frameworks, including train/validation/test split design, cross-validation, evaluation metric selection, and the conditions under which each metric is appropriate.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.356), AI-T-011 (AI, cosine: 0.356).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.399). Shared vocabulary: [design]. DCWF-only terms [execution, exercise, scenarios, support] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, conditions, cross, evaluation, frameworks, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.908, R=0.840). P exceeds R by 0.068 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Support the design and execution of exercise scenarios." and "Knowledge of model evaluation frameworks, including train/validation/test split" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.358 ≈ STS 0.399 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [design] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [design]. DCWF-only: [execution, exercise, scenarios, support]. WIDAI-only: [appropriate, conditions, cross, evaluation, frameworks, knowledge].
